baseline_binding.interpretation: The accepted STRM-000 metadata-bounds case remains historical specification-only evidence. This local-only overlay records independently authored Rust composition of one already validated descriptor and one already validated generic metadata tree.

does_not_prove: XML or an LSL desc-element interpretation
cross-component validation, normalization, inference, or generated channel metadata
runtime identity, version, creation time, UID, session, host, address, port, fingerprint, or recovery identity
discovery, networking, transport, protocol, wire, provider, or runtime behavior
source identity, authorization, admission, routing, permission, or Morphospace authority
